mapper.select:
-- 其他收入单 SELECT '其它收入单' AS documentType, f.name AS frame, COALESCE(c.name, '') AS counterparty, DATE_FORMAT(ice.time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS dateTime, ice.number AS documentNumber, COALESCE(iet.name, '') AS category, ice.total AS income, 0 AS expenditure, a.name AS settlementAccount, COALESCE(ice.data, '') AS remark FROM ice LEFT JOIN frame f ON ice.frame = f.id LEFT JOIN customer c ON ice.customer = c.id LEFT JOIN account a ON ice.account = a.id LEFT JOIN ice_info ii ON ice.id = ii.pid LEFT JOIN iet ON ii.iet = iet.id
AND DATE(ice.time) >= #{query.startTime}
AND DATE(ice.time) <= #{query.endTime}
AND '其它收入单' LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.documentType}, '%')
AND ice.number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.documentNumber}, '%')
AND iet.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.category}, '%')
AND a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.settlementAccount}, '%')
AND ice.data LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.remark}, '%')
UNION ALL
-- 其他支出单 SELECT '其它支出单' AS documentType, f.name AS frame, COALESCE(s.name, '') AS counterparty, DATE_FORMAT(oce.time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS dateTime, oce.number AS documentNumber, COALESCE(iet.name, '') AS category, 0 AS income, oce.total AS expenditure, a.name AS settlementAccount, COALESCE(oce.data, '') AS remark FROM oce LEFT JOIN frame f ON oce.frame = f.id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON oce.supplier = s.id LEFT JOIN account a ON oce.account = a.id LEFT JOIN oce_info oi ON oce.id = oi.pid LEFT JOIN iet ON oi.iet = iet.id
AND DATE(oce.time) >= #{query.startTime}
AND DATE(oce.time) <= #{query.endTime}
AND '其它支出单' LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.documentType}, '%')
AND oce.number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.documentNumber}, '%')
AND iet.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.category}, '%')
AND a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.settlementAccount}, '%')
AND oce.data LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.remark}, '%')
ORDER BY dateTime DESC

-- 其他收入单 SELECT '其它收入单' AS documentType, f.name AS frame, COALESCE(c.name, '') AS counterparty, DATE_FORMAT(ice.time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS dateTime, ice.number AS documentNumber, COALESCE(iet.name, '') AS category, ice.total AS income, 0 AS expenditure, a.name AS settlementAccount, COALESCE(ice.data, '') AS remark FROM ice LEFT JOIN frame f ON ice.frame = f.id LEFT JOIN customer c ON ice.customer = c.id LEFT JOIN account a ON ice.account = a.id LEFT JOIN ice_info ii ON ice.id = ii.pid LEFT JOIN iet ON ii.iet = iet.id
AND DATE(ice.time) >= #{query.startTime}
AND DATE(ice.time) <= #{query.endTime}
AND '其它收入单' LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.documentType}, '%')
AND ice.number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.documentNumber}, '%')
AND iet.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.category}, '%')
AND a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.settlementAccount}, '%')
AND ice.data LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.remark}, '%')
UNION ALL
-- 其他支出单 SELECT '其它支出单' AS documentType, f.name AS frame, COALESCE(s.name, '') AS counterparty, DATE_FORMAT(oce.time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS dateTime, oce.number AS documentNumber, COALESCE(iet.name, '') AS category, 0 AS income, oce.total AS expenditure, a.name AS settlementAccount, COALESCE(oce.data, '') AS remark FROM oce LEFT JOIN frame f ON oce.frame = f.id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON oce.supplier = s.id LEFT JOIN account a ON oce.account = a.id LEFT JOIN oce_info oi ON oce.id = oi.pid LEFT JOIN iet ON oi.iet = iet.id
AND DATE(oce.time) >= #{query.startTime}
AND DATE(oce.time) <= #{query.endTime}
AND '其它支出单' LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.documentType}, '%')
AND oce.number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.documentNumber}, '%')
AND iet.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.category}, '%')
AND a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.settlementAccount}, '%')
AND oce.data LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.remark}, '%')
ORDER BY dateTime DESC
